name: Pepper Cake with Pumpkin & Prunes
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Prunes, dried but soft/moist - pitted (1 cup)
3 ounces Preserved stem ginger in syrup (1/3 cup diced)
1 cup Unsweetened pumpkin, canned, solid pack
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Butter and flour an 8-cup loaf pan (10 1/4 by 3 3/4 by 3 1/4 inches).
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, cloves, and salt; set aside.
4. Cut prunes into 1/4-inch slices. Drain ginger lightly and cut into very thin slices or small dice.
5. Break nuts into coarse pieces.
6. Beat butter until soft. Add black pepper; then both sugars and beat to mix well.
7. Beat in eggs, then the pumpkin. Beat in prunes, ginger, and walnuts.
8. On low speed, add sifted dry ingredients and beat only until incorporated.
9. Turn batter into prepared pan and spread evenly.
10. Bake for about 1 hour 40 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the middle comes out dry.
11. Cool cake in pan for about 15 minutes. Remove from pan and cool on rack.
